title: Improve Error Message for Broken Switch Statement
body:
Coming from C, I did this (note - case1 and case2 are an enum):

case (variable) 
    case1:  // in case 1
    case2: // or case 2
         foundOneOrTwo <= 1;
endcase

then later, I did it again:
case (variable2) 
    case1:
    case2:
        doSomethingElse <= 1; 
endcase

I get an error message: 
Found definition of 'case2'  as a BEGIN but expected a variable

Now, I found *MY* bug - it should have been:
case1, case2:

But an error message that indicates that this syntax is incorrect would have helped me find it faster.
